title: PromotedServer
description: Allows Modpack creators to promote their modded Servers.
body:
# Promoted Server Ever wanted to show Users official Server.
Without overwriting adding them forever? ### If yes, you have come to the right Place. This Mod allows you to promote Servers using your Modpack. ### How does it work? The Mod reads the Servers out of its own servers.dat it is located in `.minecraft/config/promotedserver/server.dat` ### How do I use it? Just start your Modpack add all Servers you want to the Server Menu.
Close your Game and move the `servers.dat` to `.minecraft/config/promotedserver/server.dat`.
Add it to your Modpack and done. ✅
